section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports feeling fine most days, with occasional headaches associated with high blood pressure.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is patient-reported symptom history rather than an objective exam or test finding; however, its duplication here does not substantially mislead given the rest of the objective data in Findings.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports noticing some swelling in their lower extremities with prolonged standing.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a subjective symptom description rather than an observed exam finding; it would more appropriately belong in the HPI, but its presence in Findings is not highly misleading alongside the documented edema on exam.
